story.text:
# ✨ Keep Tides
**🌙 → 🌊 → 🌊 → ⏱️**
*selene_cosmological · cosmological · (cosmological)*

Demonstrate the relationship functions without revealing its history. Produce the observable signature (the tide) while withholding the formative event (the Theia impact).

> The tide proves. The orbit keeps. The Theia impact is forgotten by the tide and remembered only by mythology.

*Keywords:* tide · demonstrate · withhold · Theia · amnesia-protocol-precedent
